_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: inhibition of Notch signaling affected chromatin accessibility in a similar fashion as retinal injury with 16,990 regions showing increased and 12,413 regions showing decreased chromatin accessibility
details: DAPT treatment affected chromatin accessibility with 16,990 regions showing increased and 12,413 regions showing decreased chromatin accessibility
